name: zel-code-ai-os-ui
description: Static ZEL CODE AI Operating System UI prototype.

scripts.check:html:
python3 - <<'PY'
from html.parser import HTMLParser
HTMLParser().feed(open('index.html', encoding='utf-8').read())
print('html parse ok')
PY
scripts.check:svg:
python3 - <<'PY'
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
for f in list(Path('assets/logos').glob('*.svg')) + [Path('assets/logo-system.svg'), Path('assets/favicon.svg')]:
    ET.parse(f)
print('all svg parse ok')
PY
scripts.check: npm run check:html && npm run check:svg
